summary.intent: Implement pass-6 code review findings for the carousel component, primarily refactoring the single `auto_play_paused` boolean into three independent pause-source flags (manual, hover, focus) and applying several smaller fixes.
summary.outcome: All five pass-6 findings implemented: pause-source refactor (R3), index clamping via `clamp_index` (R1), drag-tick no-op (R2), `on_viewport_pointercancel` handler (R4), and `type="button"` on all button parts (R5). 133 tests pass, clippy clean, snapshots regenerated, spec synced, xci-fast green, committed and pushed.

repo: The pause state uses `HtmlAttr::Type` with value `"button"` — same convention as dialog and toggle_button components.
Index clamping in GoToSlide and FocusSlide must go through `clamp_index` rather than raw arithmetic to correctly respect loop-wrapping semantics.
The three pause sources (manual, hover, focus) are independent: a hover-exit must not resume a manual pause or a still-active focus pause; Blur only clears the focus-pause source.
Snapshot tests needed regeneration after adding `type="button"` attributes to button parts.
`is_auto_play_paused` helper must be `const fn` to satisfy clippy.
The spec in `spec/components/layout/carousel.md` must be kept in sync with implementation changes — it covers Context fields, init, all transition/connect sites, and the anatomy table.

code.finding: Replaced single `auto_play_paused: bool` field with three source flags (`auto_play_paused_manual`, `auto_play_paused_hover`, `auto_play_paused_focus`) and added a `const fn is_auto_play_paused()` helper that ORs them.
TransitionEnd site updated to clear only the manual pause source rather than the bare boolean.
Spec anatomy table rows for trigger and indicator parts updated to document `type="button"`; all Context, init, transition, and connect sections updated to match the three-source pause model.

workflow: Large mechanical refactors (field rename across many call sites) were done with targeted `sed` substitutions via Bash rather than manual edits, then verified with a grep for any remaining bare references.
Existing test `blur_resumes_when_paused` was asserting old (buggy) behavior; it had to be rewritten to test the correct focus-source-specific resume semantics rather than just deleted.
New overlap-coverage tests were added specifically for R3 to guard the multi-source independence invariant (hover-exit must not resume manual or active-focus pauses).
The workflow of: implement → test → clippy → regenerate snapshots → spec sync → xci-fast → commit/push/re-label was used as the standard pass-completion sequence.

friction: Multiple rounds of reading the same file regions were needed because edits shifted line numbers, requiring re-reads before each subsequent edit.
The `blur_resumes_when_paused` test encoded the old buggy behavior, so it silently passed against wrong logic and had to be identified and corrected as part of the refactor.
Batch `sed` substitutions for read-sites required careful escaping and verification that no bare `auto_play_paused` references remained afterward.
open_items: No open items noted — all five pass-6 findings were fully implemented, tested, spec-synced, and landed.
